name: Bachin TA4
safeStartupSequence: G10 L2 P1 X0 Y0 Z0

_notes.penUpCommand: Confirmed 2026-05-09: G1 Z0 lifts pen reliably. Feed raised to F6000 on 2026-05-10 for faster marker lift between strokes.
_notes.penDownCommand: Confirmed 2026-05-09: G1 Z8 lowers pen. Feed raised to F6000 on 2026-05-10 for faster marker contact between strokes. Requires $1=255 in startup sequence — Z axis is spring-return stepper; without always-on hold current the spring ejects pen after ~250ms idle
_notes.stepIdleDelay: $1=255 set on job start to hold Z stepper energized. $1=250 restored on shutdown so BachinMaker is unaffected. M3/spindle commands do not control the pen — Z axis only.
_notes.origin: User reset position with Bachin software, then measured usable extents from origin.
_notes.workArea: Measured 2026-05-09: X=180 mm to the right, Y=-210 mm downward from origin. BachinMaker logs report larger travel limits, but these measured values are the safer usable drawing area.
